user.title: Add PiKVM
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to a PiKVM device.

data.name: Name
data.ssh_enabled: Enable SSH features (LEDs, OLED, update status, shutdown)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure PiKVM
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings. Leave the password empty to keep the current one.

data.ssh_enabled: Enable SSH features (LEDs, OLED, update status, shutdown)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the kvmd API.

send_text.name: Send text
send_text.description: Type text on the target via the PiKVM virtual keyboard.

text.name: Text
text.description: The text to type. \n and <enter> are converted to the Enter key.

slow.name: Slow typing
slow.description: Type character by character via key events. Slower, but reliable for early-boot prompts (e.g. LUKS passphrases).

delay.name: Delay
delay.description: Delay between key press and release in seconds (slow mode only).

keymap.name: Keymap
keymap.description: Keyboard layout of the target. Defaults to the configured keymap.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The PiKVM device to type on. Only required when multiple PiKVMs are configured.

send_key.name: Send key
send_key.description: Press a single key on the target (e.g. Escape, Enter, F2, CTRL-ALT-DEL).

key.name: Key
key.description: Web key name (Escape, Enter, KeyA, Digit1, F2, ...) or alias (ESC, ENTER, CTRL-ALT-DEL).

delay.name: Delay
delay.description: Delay between key press and release in seconds.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The PiKVM device to type on. Only required when multiple PiKVMs are configured.
